description_long: This is a wide, multi-lane urban roadway section with four lanes separated by yellow solid and dashed lines. The surface is made of dark asphalt, featuring two solid yellow lines on the outer edges and three dashed white lines marking the lane divisions. The road is flat and expansive, designed for high-capacity vehicle traffic, typical of primary city streets or boulevards. The lane markings are clear and standardized, with no visible curbs, sidewalks, or additional road features. There are no visible traffic signs, lighting fixtures, or pedestrian crossings present. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, suitable for modern urban environments.
description: A wide, four-lane urban road section with solid yellow edge lines and dashed white lane dividers on a dark asphalt surface. No curbs, signage, or pedestrian features are present.
description_view_0: Front view showing four lanes with solid yellow lines on the edges and dashed white lines dividing the lanes.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the lane markings and the width of the road, with clear visibility of the yellow and white lines.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the same lane and edge markings.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, emphasizing the lane structure and the absence of curbs or additional features.
attribute_lane_markings: Four lanes separated by three dashed white lines and two solid yellow edge lines; all markings are standard, with no special symbols or turn lanes.
